name: just-bash-harness
description: Agentic harness on top of just-bash + agent-skills.
author: Mauricio Perera

scripts.test: node --test --import=tsx src/cli-args.test.ts src/approval.test.ts src/policy.test.ts src/provider.test.ts src/provider-anthropic.test.ts src/provider-cloudflare.test.ts src/toolbox.test.ts src/memory.test.ts
scripts.test:list: node --test --import=tsx --test-reporter=spec src/cli-args.test.ts src/approval.test.ts src/policy.test.ts src/provider.test.ts src/provider-anthropic.test.ts src/provider-cloudflare.test.ts src/toolbox.test.ts src/memory.test.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
